context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the setup instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **HARD GATE — Environment Check** (all items must pass before Phase 2):

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Fill in `DEPLOY_CLI` (e.g., `flyctl`, `gigalixir`, custom Docker) and the appropriate secret names. Use the same action SHAs and versions from the shared table above.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify everything works end-to-end:**

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write `SETUP_CHECKLIST.md`** recording the final state of all Phase 1 HARD GATE items plus:

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use ✓/✗ symbols and include counts (e.g., number of deps, migrations, tests) for each item.
